accepted.claim: ChatGPT has more than 900 million weekly active users.

declined.claim: OpenAI expanded its revolving credit facility to approximately $4.7 billion.
OpenAI expects to soon reach 1 billion weekly active users, which would be the fastest platform to achieve that milestone.
OpenAI's ads pilot reached more than $100 million in ARR in under six weeks.

raw_pool.claim: Over $3 billion was raised from individual investors through bank channels in this round.
ChatGPT has 6x the monthly web visits and mobile sessions compared to the next largest AI app.
Total AI time spent on ChatGPT is 4x the next largest AI app and 4x all other AI apps combined.
OpenAI's search usage has nearly tripled in the past year.
Enterprise revenue now makes up more than 40% of OpenAI's total revenue.
Enterprise revenue is on track to reach parity with consumer revenue by end of 2026.
OpenAI's APIs now process more than 15 billion tokens per minute.
Codex serves over 2 million weekly users, up 5x in the past three months.
Codex weekly user growth is up 5x in the past three months.
Codex usage is growing more than 70% month over month.
OpenAI was the fastest technology platform to reach 10 million users and 100 million users.
The funding round was anchored by Amazon, NVIDIA, SoftBank, and Microsoft, with SoftBank co-leading alongside a16z, D.E. Shaw Ventures, MGX, TPG, and T. Rowe Price.
